title: City Brake Active System Functional Inspection
section: Driver assistance SRS airbags seat belts

blocks.text: City Brake Active System Functional Inspection
1. City Brake Active System Functional Inspection

items: Properly sized tires must be installed.

blocks.text: The City Brake Active System radar/control unit may have difficulty recognizing targets due to the surrounding environment.

items.text: If you have difficulty recognizing the target, change the following environment
If you have difficulty recognizing the target, change the following environment

blocks.text: Prepare the following The target should be located approximately 2.0 m from the front edge of the inspection vehicle. Place the steering wheel in the straight ahead position. Place the select lever in the P position. Apply the parking brake. Turn ignition OFF (LOCK) mode.

items.text: The target shall be a vehicle. The following is a list of vehicles suitable for the target.
Vehicles with reflectors built into the tail lens
Vehicles with reflectors built into the tail lens
Do it in a well-lit area.
Do it in a well-lit area.
Check for lighting or lighting reflections behind the target installation location.
Check for lighting or lighting reflections behind the target installation location.
The cargo space should be empty except for a puncture repair kit and onboard tools.
The cargo space should be empty except for a puncture repair kit and onboard tools.

blocks.text: Connect HDS to the data link coupler (A) located in the driver's seat. Turn ignition to ON mode. Ensure that HDS communicates with the vehicle and the City Brake Active System radar/control unit. Select the data list from the HDS Driver Assistance System, City Brake Active System menu and perform a function check. Inspections are performed with one person in the driver's seat. Verify that the inspection results are the following values data parameter Target distance 2.0m±50cm

items.text: If not communicating, Inspect data link circuits Do.
If not communicating, Inspect data link circuits Do.
If the target distance deviates from the above values, check the following conditions and make appropriate repairs
If the target distance deviates from the above values, check the following conditions and make appropriate repairs
City Brake Active System Radar/Control Unit installed status
City Brake Active System Radar/Control Unit installed status

If the windshield is dirty, or if the target distance exceeds the standard value even though the CITY BRAKE ACTIVE SYSTEM radar/control unit is installed in good condition, replace the unit with a new CITY BRAKE ACTIVE SYSTEM radar/control unit.

If the windshield is dirty, or if the target distance exceeds the standard value even though the CITY BRAKE ACTIVE SYSTEM radar/control unit is installed in good condition, replace the unit with a new CITY BRAKE ACTIVE SYSTEM radar/control unit.
